title: EdibleTools
body:
# EdibleTools Resource Pack
**EdibleTools** is a **Minecraft Resource Pack** that changes most **foodstuff** textures to **tools**.

Useful for making the type of videos where the player eats tools.

## Full List of Textures Changed
Wooden Sword - Bread

Wooden Pickaxe - Baked Potato

Wooden Axe - Beetroot Soup

Wooden Shovel - Cod

Wooden Hoe - Cooked Chicken

Stone Sword - Cooked Beef

Stone Pickaxe - Cooked Cod

Stone Axe - Cooked Porkchop

Stone Shovel - Cooked Mutton

Stone Hoe - Cooked Rabbit

Iron Sword - Cooked Salmon

Iron Pickaxe - Cookie

Iron Axe - Golden Carrot

Iron Shovel - Golden Apple

Iron Hoe - Melon Slice

Golden Sword - Potato

Golden Pickaxe - Pumpkin Pie

Golden Axe - Rabbit Stew

Golden Shovel - Suspicious Stew

Golden Hoe - Sweet Berries

Bow - Carrot
